# Accountability.ai

> The measurement standard for AI. Accountability.ai develops the Agent Decision Record (AgDR) — an open standard for tamper-evident, cryptographically signed AI decision records. Built for the intelligent age.

## Standard

- [AgDR v0.2 Specification](https://accountability.ai/adr-spec-v0.1.html): The founding specification for the Agent Decision Record open standard.
- [Atomic Kernel Inference Standard](https://accountability.ai/sandbox.html): Live sandbox demonstrating AgDR decision capture across six real-world scenarios.
- [Reasoning Capture Methodology](https://accountability.ai/README.html): Methodology for capturing AI reasoning at the kernel level.

## Policy Framework

- [PPP Triplet — Provenance, Place, Purpose](https://accountability.ai/ppp-legal-compliance.html): How the PPP policy triplet enables legal compliance across jurisdictions.
- [Deep Explanation of the PPP Triplet](https://accountability.ai/Deep Explanation of the PPP Triplet in AgDR v.html): Technical deep-dive into the PPP framework.

## Comparisons

- [Aviation Black Box Comparison](https://accountability.ai/comparison-aviation-black-box.html): AgDR compared to aviation flight data recorders as an evidentiary standard.
- [Medical Records Comparison](https://accountability.ai/comparison-medical-records.html): AgDR compared to medical recordkeeping standards.
- [AGI Court Proceedings 2076](https://accountability.ai/future-agi-court.html): Forward-looking analysis of AgDR as legal evidence.

## Governance

- [CHANGELOG](https://accountability.ai/CHANGELOG.html): Version history and amendments to the AgDR standard.
- [License](https://accountability.ai/LICENSE.html): AgDR is dual-licensed CC0 1.0 Universal and Apache License 2.0.

## Contact

Founding inquiries: founding@accountability.ai
GitHub: https://github.com/aiccountability-source/AgDR
